chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-344 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.1575/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 6. 3. For orders on Misc. No.1576/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 28.01.2026. Petitioner is present in person. ------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. The Petitioner, present in person, purports to be aggrieved by the election of the Respondent No.7 as Town Chairman, Sohrab Goth, Karachi and assails the same on the ground that said Respondent is a foreign national. However, the Petitioner has failed to file any Official document to establish that the Respondent is holding such Office. Furthermore, it transpires that the Respondent No.7 is holding a CNIC issued by the NADRA. According to the Petitioner, the same has been obtained through fraudulent means. Be that as it may, such issues cannot be examined in the present proceeding. The matter does not present a fit case for issuance of a writ and stands dismissed accordingly, alongwith other pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
